sp_mca207_sel1_def:
CREATE PROCEDURE SP_MCA207_SEL1
(
	@S_PJT_NO 	VARCHAR(20))
AS
BEGIN
	CREATE TABLE #TEMP
	(
		ITEM_KIND	VARCHAR(2),
		STS			VARCHAR(8),
		KIND_PO_AMT	NUMERIC(18, 4)
	)

	DECLARE @S_AMT NUMERIC(18, 4)

	INSERT	INTO #TEMP (ITEM_KIND, STS, KIND_PO_AMT)
	SELECT	B.ITEM_KIND,'일반발주' AS STS, SUM(A.PO_AMT) AS KIND_PO_AMT
      FROM  MCA210T A
			INNER JOIN BBA010T B
			ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD
     WHERE	A.PJT_NO = @S_PJT_NO
       AND  A.STS IN ('50','55','60','80','90')
     GROUP BY B.ITEM_KIND
	UNION ALL
	SELECT	C.ITEM_KIND,'재고발주' AS STS, SUM(ISNULL((A.ADV_QTY * B.AVG_PRICE), 0)) 
	  FROM	MAD111T A, IBA200T B, BBA010T C
	 WHERE	A.PJT_NO = @S_PJT_NO
	   AND	A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD
       AND	A.WH_CD = B.WH_CD 
	   AND	LEFT(A.ADV_DT,6) = B.BASE_YYYYMM
       AND	A.ITEM_CD = C.ITEM_CD
       AND  A.ADV_KIND = 'W'
	GROUP BY C.ITEM_KIND

	SELECT @S_AMT = SUM(KIND_PO_AMT) 
	  FROM #TEMP;

	SELECT ITEM_KIND, STS, KIND_PO_AMT, ROUND((KIND_PO_AMT / @S_AMT * 100),2) AS RATE
	  FROM #TEMP
END
sp_mca210s_def:
/*
	구매품의서출력 의 결제 관련 SP임
	차후에 작성해야 할것 같음
	SP 명 변경 --> SP_MCA200T_CONSULT_SETTLE, SP_MCA200T_SETTLE 중 하나
*/
CREATE	PROCEDURE [mirae].[SP_MCA210S]
( 
	@S_PO_NO		varchar(20)
) 

AS

SET NOCOUNT ON

CREATE     TABLE #TEMP
(
	PO_NO			VARCHAR(20),
	CON_PRICE_YN	VARCHAR(20),
	PO_PRICE		DECIMAL,
	PO_AMT			DECIMAL,
	MONEY_UNIT		VARCHAR(10),
	TOT_PO_AMT		DECIMAL,
	PAY_TYPE		VARCHAR(20),
	CUST_NM			VARCHAR(50),
	PO_PRSN			VARCHAR(20),
	PO_DT			VARCHAR(10),
	PJT_NO			VARCHAR(20),
	PJT_NM          VARCHAR(50),
	P_ITEM_CD		VARCHAR(20),
	ITEM_CD			VARCHAR(20),
	ITEM_NM         VARCHAR(50),
	SPEC            VARCHAR(100),
	PO_UNIT_QTY		DECIMAL,
	INV_UNIT        VARCHAR(20),
	DVRY_DT			VARCHAR(10),
	BE_PO_PRICE		DECIMAL,
	RMK				VARCHAR(120)
)			

CREATE TABLE #TEMP_1
(
	ITEM_CD		VARCHAR(20),
 	UP_DATE	VARCHAR(8)
)

CREATE TABLE #TEMP_2
(
	ITEM_CD		VARCHAR(20),
	BE_PO_PRICE	DECIMAL
)

DECLARE   @S_PO_DT   VARCHAR(50)

SELECT  @S_PO_DT = MAX(B.PO_DT)
  FROM	MCA210T A, MCA200T B
 WHERE  A.PO_NO = B.PO_NO AND A.PO_NO =  @S_PO_NO

INSERT #TEMP (PO_NO, CON_PRICE_YN, PO_PRICE, PO_AMT, MONEY_UNIT, TOT_PO_AMT, PAY_TYPE,
              CUST_NM, PO_PRSN, PO_DT, PJT_NO,PJT_NM ,P_ITEM_CD, ITEM_CD,ITEM_NM, SPEC,PO_UNIT_QTY, INV_UNIT, DVRY_DT,BE_PO_PRICE, RMK)
 SELECT     A.PO_NO,
            CASE WHEN B.CON_PRICE_YN = 'Y' THEN '정발주' ELSE '가발주' END AS CON_PRICE_YN,
            CASE WHEN A.MONEY_UNIT = 'KRW' THEN A.PO_PRICE ELSE A.FOR_PRICE END AS PO_PRICE,
            CASE WHEN A.MONEY_UNIT = 'KRW' THEN A.PO_AMT ELSE A.FOR_AMT END AS PO_AMT,
            A.MONEY_UNIT,
            (SELECT SUM(ZZ.PO_AMT) FROM MCA210T ZZ WHERE PO_NO = A.PO_NO) AS TOT_PO_AMT,
            (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M012' AND MINOR_CD =  B.PAY_TYPE) AS PAY_TYPE,
            (SELECT CUST_F_NM FROM BAA020T WHERE CUST_CD = B.CUST_CD) AS CUST_NM,
            (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M601' AND MINOR_CD =  A.PO_PRSN) AS PO_PRSN,
            B.PO_DT, A.PJT_NO, D.PJT_NAME, A.P_ITEM_CD, A.ITEM_CD, C.ITEM_NM, C.SPEC,         
            A.PO_UNIT_QTY, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'B013' AND MINOR_CD = C.INV_UNIT) AS INV_UNIT,
            A.DVRY_DT, 0, '[' + (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM ZAA010T WHERE MAJOR_CD = 'M014' AND MINOR_CD = A.PO_PLAN_KIND) + '] ' + A.RMK AS RMK
 FROM       MCA210T A
            INNER   JOIN    MCA200T B
            ON  A.PO_NO     =       B.PO_NO
            INNER   JOIN    BBA010T C
            ON  A.ITEM_CD   =       C.ITEM_CD
            INNER   JOIN    SCA200T D
            ON  A.PJT_NO    =       D.PJT_NO
 WHERE      A.PO_NO     =       @S_PO_NO
   AND      A.STS       <>      '70'
 ORDER BY A.PJT_NO

--일년전 종전 단가 산출
INSERT	#TEMP_1
SELECT	A.ITEM_CD,MAX(B.UPDATE_DATE)
  FROM	#TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN BBA014T B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD AND LEFT(UPDATE_DATE,4) = LEFT(@S_PO_DT,4)-1
 GROUP BY A.ITEM_CD

INSERT	#TEMP_2
SELECT	A.ITEM_CD,ISNULL(MAX(B.DOM_PRICE),0)
  FROM	#TEMP_1 A LEFT OUTER JOIN  BBA014T B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD AND A.UP_DATE = B.UPDATE_DATE
GROUP BY A.ITEM_CD

UPDATE	#TEMP
   SET	BE_PO_PRICE = T2.BE_PO_PRICE
  FROM	#TEMP T1, #TEMP_2 T2
 WHERE	T1.ITEM_CD = T2.ITEM_CD
   AND	T1.BE_PO_PRICE =0

--발주 최근 단가
DELETE #TEMP_1
DELETE #TEMP_2

INSERT	#TEMP_1
SELECT	A.ITEM_CD,MIN(B.UPDATE_DATE)
  FROM	#TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN BBA014T B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD AND LEFT(UPDATE_DATE,4) = LEFT(@S_PO_DT,4)
 GROUP BY A.ITEM_CD

INSERT	#TEMP_2
SELECT	A.ITEM_CD,ISNULL(MAX(B.DOM_PRICE),0)
  FROM	#TEMP_1 A LEFT OUTER JOIN  BBA014T B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.ITEM_CD AND A.UP_DATE = B.UPDATE_DATE
 GROUP BY A.ITEM_CD

UPDATE	#TEMP
   SET	BE_PO_PRICE = T2.BE_PO_PRICE
  FROM	#TEMP T1, #TEMP_2 T2
 WHERE	T1.ITEM_CD = T2.ITEM_CD
   AND	T1.BE_PO_PRICE =0

--일년후 종전 단가
DELETE #TEMP_1
DELETE #TEMP_2

INSERT	#TEMP_1
SELECT	A.ITEM_CD,MAX(B.UPDATE_DATE)
  FROM	#TEMP A LEFT OUTER JOIN BBA014T B ON A.ITEM_CD = B.IT
